lines.english: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is permeating all hearts.
Our Eternal, Imperishable, Incomprehensible Lord and Master,
Millions of silent sages dwell in silence. ||7||
The Guru has blessed Nanak with enlightenment. ||8||2||5||
Wherever I look, I see Your Dwelling, O Lord.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Now, I intuitively enjoy endless pleasures and wondrous play.
The True Guru has blessed me with this gift.
He has given me the Priceless Jewel of the Lord's Name.
Says Nanak, True is the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਚੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bahur bahur tis sang man raachee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Again and again, my mind remains immersed in it. ||1||Pause||
God has spontaneously met with Nanak. ||1||
Spontaneously, I feed on the Love of God.
Spontaneously, I take God's Name.
Spontaneously, I am saved by the Word of the Shabad.
Spontaneously, I am rid of sorrow.
Spontaneously, my treasures are filled to overflowing. ||2||
Spontaneously, my works are perfectly accomplished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਿੰਤੋ ਹੀ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਕੀਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: achinto hee ihu man vas keetaa |3|
lines.english: Spontaneously, I have brought my mind under control. ||3||
Spontaneously, God has comforted me.
Spontaneously, my enemies have become friends.
Spontaneously, my hopes have been fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨੋ ਮੰਤੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: achint ham kau gur deeno mant |4|
lines.english: Spontaneously, I have been blessed with the Guru's Mantra. ||4||
Spontaneously, I have totally realized the essence of reality.
Spontaneously, my darkness has been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਿੰਤੋ ਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: achinto hee prabh ghatt ghatt ddeetthaa |5|
lines.english: Spontaneously, I behold God in each and every heart. ||5||
Spontaneously, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise seems so sweet to my mind.
Spontaneously, I am rid of hatred.
Spontaneously, peace and celestial harmony fill my mind.
Spontaneously, all my doubts have been dispelled.
I have spontaneously realized the Eternal, Unchanging Lord.
Spontaneously, the Lord of the Universe has revealed Himself to me. ||6||
Spontaneously, my mind has been pleased and appeased.
Spontaneously, the Unstruck Melody of the Sound-current resounds within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਚਿੰਤ ਚਰੀ ਹਥਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਟੇਕਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: achint charee hath har har ttekaa |7|
lines.english: Spontaneously, the Support of the Lord, Har, Har, has come into my hands. ||7||
Spontaneously, all wisdom and knowledge has welled up within me.
Spontaneously, all my cares and worries have been taken away.
Spontaneously, God has recorded my pre-ordained destiny.
Nanak, Nanak, Nanak, has merged into the Image of God. ||8||3||6||
Spontaneously, the One Lord and Master God has met me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau baanee bhagataa kee | kabeer jeeo ghar 1 |
lines.english: Bhairao, The Word Of The Devotees, Kabeer Jee, First House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਂਠਿ ਨ ਬਾਧਉ ਬੇਚਿ ਨ ਖਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gaantth na baadhau bech na khaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I do not tie it up to hide it, nor do I sell it to make my living. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਖੇਤੀ ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਬਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: naau mere khetee naau mere baaree |
lines.english: The Name is my crop, and the Name is my field.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਕੋ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eihu dhan mere har ko naau |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord - this alone is my wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਪੂੰਜੀ ॥
lines.translit: naau mere maaeaa naau mere poonjee |
lines.english: The Name is Maya and wealth for me; the Name is my capital.
I do not forsake You; I do not know any other at all. ||2||
As Your humble servant, I perform devotional worship to You; I seek Your Sanctuary. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਬੰਧਿਪ ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naau mere bandhip naau mere bhaaee |
lines.english: The Name is my family, the Name is my brother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੰਗਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naau mere sang ant hoe sakhaaee |3|
lines.english: The Name is my companion, who will help me in the end. ||3||
One whom the Lord keeps detached from Maya

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਹਉ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਦਾਸੁ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: keh kabeer hau taa ko daas |4|1|
lines.english: - says Kabeer, I am his slave. ||4||1||
No one, not even the kings and queens, shall remain. ||1||
Naked we come, and naked we go.
